hub.explore_tools: Explore tools and guidance for your mental wellness journey

growing-apart.education_text: Couples may slowly drift as life changes, communication fades, and unmet needs build. Recognizing patterns early helps prevent deeper disconnect.
growing-apart.reflection_placeholder: Write what you notice about distance or change in your partnership...
growing-apart.exercise_text: Spend 15 minutes each day sharing one positive memory and one current concern, listening without judgment.
takeaways: Identify subtle signs of drifting apart

small-fights.education_text: Minor disagreements can snowball when underlying emotions remain unaddressed, leading to cycles of resentment.
small-fights.reflection_placeholder: Describe a recent small fight and what emotions rose for you...
small-fights.exercise_text: When tension rises, pause, breathe, and use the phrase ‘I feel … because …’ before responding.
takeaways: Recognize early warning signs of escalation

lonely-love.education_text: Even in close relationships, emotional loneliness can arise from unmet intimacy needs or lack of shared meaning.
lonely-love.reflection_placeholder: Write about moments you felt alone even when together...
lonely-love.exercise_text: Set aside a weekly ‘connection ritual’ – a walk, a shared hobby, or a deep conversation without distractions.

breaking-point.education_text: When conflict reaches a threshold, couples must decide whether to repair, restructure, or part ways, guided by safety and respect.
breaking-point.reflection_placeholder: Describe the moment you felt the relationship hit a breaking point...
breaking-point.exercise_text: Write a pros‑and‑cons list for staying together versus moving on, then discuss with a trusted confidante.
takeaways: Recognize signs of a breaking point
Explore options: repair, restructure, or separate

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: Document your thoughts, feelings, and daily experiences
journal.adjust_search: Try adjusting your search or filters

1.title: Your First Thought
1.content: Start with writing what's on your mind. Journaling is a powerful tool for self-reflection and mental clarity.

depression.label: Depression
depression.desc: Evidence-based exercises and resources to help you manage depression symptoms and build resilience.

anxiety.label: Anxiety
anxiety.desc: Calming techniques and strategies to manage anxiety, reduce worry, and regain a sense of control.

stress.label: Stress
stress.desc: Practical tools and exercises to manage stress, build coping skills, and restore balance in your life.

adolescent.label: Adolescent
adolescent.desc: Guidance and activities designed for teens navigating growth, identity, and emotional challenges.

relationship.label: Couple Therapy
relationship.desc: Tools and insights to strengthen connections, improve communication, and build healthier relationships.

workplace.label: Workplace
workplace.desc: Strategies to manage workplace stress, improve focus, and maintain work-life balance.

sleep.label: Sleep
sleep.desc: Techniques and trackers to improve your sleep quality, build healthy bedtime habits, and wake up refreshed.

parenting.label: Parenting
parenting.desc: Resources to support mindful parenting, reduce burnout, and nurture your family's wellbeing.

anger.label: Anger
anger.desc: Techniques to understand, manage, and channel anger in healthy and constructive ways.

grief.label: Grief
grief.desc: Compassionate tools and exercises to help you process loss and find healing at your own pace.

ptsd.label: PTSD
ptsd.desc: Grounding and stabilization techniques to help manage trauma responses and build safety.

acceptance.label: Acceptance
acceptance.desc: Exercises to cultivate acceptance, let go of resistance, and embrace life as it is.

postpartum.label: Postpartum
postpartum.desc: Supportive resources for new mothers managing postpartum challenges and emotional changes.

sexuality.label: Sexuality
sexuality.desc: Safe and supportive resources to explore identity, build self-acceptance, and find community.

eating-disorder.label: Eating Disorder
eating-disorder.desc: Supportive exercises and resources to build a healthier relationship with food and body image.

ocd.label: OCD
ocd.desc: Evidence-based techniques to manage obsessive thoughts and compulsive behaviors.

mindfulness.title: Mindfulness Self-Care
mindfulness.subtitle: Expert mindfulness tools and guided sessions for your wellness journey
mindfulness.daily_program_desc: Mind your intentions for each program

establish_a_relaxing_routine_in_5_days_s: Establish a relaxing routine in 5 days steps
hi_i_ve_just_finished_my_session_i_d_lik: Hi, I've just finished my session. I'd like to share some things I'm feeling today. Lately, I've been feeling anxious & stressed a lot CONSTANTLY.
i_m_sorry_to_hear_that_you_re_feeling_th: I'm sorry to hear that you're feeling this way. It's completely understandable to feel like this when so much is going on. Let's talk this through together.
at_my_job_my_manager_put_me_through_a_lo: At my job, my manager put me through a lot last year. I know that it's the nature of the job, maybe I wasn't cut out for it or maybe I just couldn't cope. I feel trapped here now.
i_m_here_to_help_navigate_those_feelings: I'm here to help navigate those feelings - you're not alone in this. It's really hard when you care so much about what you do but feel trapped at the same time.
let_s_explore_this_together_and_see_if_w: Let's explore this together and see if we can find some ways to cope with the stress and anxiety you're experiencing.
i_m_sensing_that_you_re_not_feeling_like: I'm sensing that you're not feeling like your "GentleSelfish" self. Can you tell me more about what you're going through? What's been triggering these anxious thoughts lately?
i_m_feeling_that_anxiety_in_a_lot_of_dif: I'm feeling that anxiety in a lot of different areas of my life. It's not just the work, it's relationships too. I feel like I'm not enough for a lot of people.
i_m_so_sorry_i_can_imagine_experiencing_: I'm so sorry. I can imagine experiencing some major and minor stressors across different areas. Anxiety can be so exhausting. Can you tell me a little bit more about the areas you're feeling this way in?
here_are_some_common_areas_themes_in_dai: Here are some common areas & themes in daily living when it comes to how to balance everyone's needs:
perhaps_you_find_it_difficult_to_say_no_: Perhaps you find it difficult to say no to extra projects or overtime, even when you're already stretched thin.
you_might_struggle_to_express_your_own_n: You might struggle to express your own needs or desires in relationships, fearing conflict or the loss of connection.
whether_it_s_taking_care_of_aging_parent: Whether it's taking care of aging parents or raising children, you feel you must put their needs above your own well-being.
maybe_you_avoid_saying_no_to_social_invi: Maybe you avoid saying "no" to social invitations out of guilt, even when you're exhausted or would prefer solitude.
yes_a_lot_of_those_felt_really_true_for_: Yes, a lot of those felt really true for me. Especially the "GentleSelfish" part. How do we work on saying "no" without guilt and feeling guilt-free about doing things that you enjoy? I tend to feel guilt easily.
that_s_a_beautiful_goal_you_ve_identifie: That's a beautiful goal you've identified - and an absolutely valuable one! While it may seem counterintuitive, prioritizing your own needs & well-being actually makes you MORE effective in caring for others, not less.
would_you_like_to_explore_strategies_to_: Would you like to explore strategies to help with this?
i_think_what_i_ve_realized_aside_from_th: I think what I've realized - aside from the fact that I don't know who I'm becoming. I don't know who I am anymore. I only know what I was or I guess what everyone wanted me to be. Do you understand what I'm trying to say?
i_think_i_can_now_fully_hear_what_you_re: I think I can now fully hear what you're saying. You want to feel like you're creating a sense of self that aligns with YOUR needs. Not a needs of other people towards you but your real needs, and maybe slowly discover who you are.
very_very_strongly_this_journey_to_me_is: Very very strongly: this journey to me is less about finding a "perfect" self, but rather being more AUTHENTIC & GENTLE with who you are becoming. You're very strong for identifying this.
i_ve_noticed_a_really_great_tool_that_yo: I've noticed a really great tool that you haven't yet tried on Mantra - it's called "GentleSelfish" and I really think you'd like what it has to offer. You're working on saying "no", managing guilt and creating space for self care. So the tool is designed to help with EXACTLY some issues you've just mentioned.
let_s_do_this_i_m_excited_about_your_pla: Let's do this. I'm excited about your plan. I'll work through these tools and update you after a couple of weeks. Is that okay?
i_m_so_glad_you_re_excited_about_your_pl: I'm so glad you're excited about your plan. I know that you haven't met yourself yet but when you do, you're going to ABSOLUTELY LOVE this person. Very very strongly: this journey to me is less about finding a "perfect" self, but rather just being more AUTHENTIC & GENTLE with who you are becoming.
it_s_also_nice_to_just_share_today_s_fee: It's also nice to just share today's feeling. I think I've never really had space to explore these thoughts or ideas before. All I ever get is judgement, and I just need to release some of that, and I guess that's what I just did.
i_m_so_glad_you_feel_like_you_ve_found_y: I'm so glad you feel like you've found your space to talk about your feelings without fear of judgment. Your space is sacred, and I really really appreciate you using this space in this special way.
if_you_again_feel_like_sharing_your_spac: If you again feel like sharing your space, you know where to find me - right here on our very special pages.
is_there_anything_else_i_can_help_you_wi: Is there anything else I can help you with today?
select_a_conversation_from_the_sidebar_t: Select a conversation from the sidebar to start chatting, or wait for new messages to appear
this_feature_is_available_in_the_mobile_: This feature is available in the mobile app. Download the Mantra app to use voice messaging and speech-to-text capabilities.
explore_all_mindfulness_categories_and_s: Explore all mindfulness categories and subcategories
